title: Special Binary String
description: A special binary string has equal zero/one counts and every prefix has at least as many ones. Swap adjacent special substrings to obtain the lexicographically largest result. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: s: str. 1 <= len(s) <=50; s is guaranteed special; swaps exchange adjacent nonempty special substrings; return a string.
output_contract: Return string using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
